# CreditBrain — robots.txt
# https://credbrain.in

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block authenticated/private routes
Disallow: /dashboard
Disallow: /dashboard/
Disallow: /settings
Disallow: /settings/
Disallow: /auth
Disallow: /auth/

# Block internal API
Disallow: /api/

# Allow important public paths explicitly
Allow: /cards
Allow: /cards/
Allow: /blog
Allow: /blog/
Allow: /compare
Allow: /simulator
Allow: /expense-profiler

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://credbrain.in/sitemap.xml
